granularity-prompt.signature: AskUserQuestion for targetSetCount in new-version Step 7
granularity-prompt.description: Adds a user-facing granularity selection prompt before roadmapper spawning. Options: Compact (3-5), Standard (6-10), Granular (11-15), Auto.

backward-compatible-default.description: If the user does not select a granularity (or selects Auto), the roadmapper defaults to a more generous decomposition (6-10 range) rather than the current minimal tendency.

parameter-passthrough.description: The selected targetSetCount value must be passed verbatim to the roadmapper agent spawn task string.

definition.scope: Add a user-facing set count granularity prompt to the new-version skill and make the roadmapper default to a more generous decomposition.

tasks.description: Add AskUserQuestion for targetSetCount in new-version Step 7
tasks.acceptance: User can choose Compact/Standard/Granular/Auto before roadmapper runs

tasks.description: Pass targetSetCount to roadmapper agent spawn
tasks.acceptance: Roadmapper receives the parameter in its task string

tasks.description: Update role-roadmapper.md default behavior to prefer 6-10 range
tasks.acceptance: Auto mode produces more generous decomposition than current behavior

acceptance: New-version skill prompts for granularity before roadmapper
targetSetCount is passed to roadmapper agent
Roadmapper default is more generous (6-10 range for Auto)
